name: USS Chickasaw (AT 83)
events: 29 Jul 1943 USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. D. McGregor, USN) departed Pearl Harbor for exercises with USS Allen (T/Lt.Cdr. H.H. Nielsen, USN) and USS Chickasaw (T/Lt. J.F. King, USN).
They remained out for night exercises.
In the morning of 30 July, USS Wahoo (T/Cdr. D.W. Morton, USN) joined the exercises.
On completion of the exercises in the afternoon of 30 July.
